task_completion.description: Remove internal draft notes from the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the visible document text in Calligra Words to ensure there are no obvious internal draft notes, comments, or placeholder text (e.g., text in brackets like [Insert Table Here] or [Draft Note]).

task_completion.description: Apply structural heading hierarchies (H1 and H2)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check that main sections ('Executive Summary', 'Meteorological Setup', 'Warning Timeline', 'Damage Survey', 'Conclusion') are formatted as large primary headings, and subsections ('Synoptic Environment', 'Radar Analysis', 'Briarwood Elementary', 'Plaza Towers Elementary') are formatted as smaller secondary headings.

task_completion.description: Create a formatted damage summary table
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a structured grid table in the document containing the exact columns: 'Location', 'EF Rating', 'Est. Wind (mph)', and 'Fatalities'.
Look for a 'Table of Contents' block, typically at the beginning of the document, listing the headings and their corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: Apply professional document styling to title and body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check that the title 'Service Assessment: May 20, 2013 Moore, Oklahoma Tornado' is prominently styled (e.g., Title style, centered, large font) at the top, and body paragraphs are neatly aligned or justified.

Look at the Calligra Words window title bar; it should display 'moore_assessment_draft.odt' without an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk), or look for a completed save action (File > Save) in the trajectory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Calligra Words GUI to format the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent interacted with the Calligra Words graphical interface (using menus, toolbars, and dialogs) to format the text, insert the table, and generate the TOC, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent created a genuine table element
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the damage summary is a real table element with distinct cells and gridlines, not just plain text aligned manually with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: Agent inserted a genuine Table of Contents
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the Table of Contents appears to be an automatically generated element by the word processor (often indicated by a specific bounding box, gray background, or perfect tab leaders), rather than manually typed text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected H1 sections: 'Executive Summary', 'Meteorological Setup', 'Warning Timeline', 'Damage Survey', 'Conclusion'. Expected H2 subsections: 'Synoptic Environment', 'Radar Analysis', 'Briarwood Elementary', 'Plaza Towers Elementary'. Expected table columns: 'Location', 'EF Rating', 'Est. Wind (mph)', 'Fatalities'. Title text: 'Service Assessment: May 20, 2013 Moore, Oklahoma Tornado'. Body alignment samples to check: 'On the afternoon of May 20, 2013...', 'The synoptic environment...', 'The NWS Norman Forecast Office...', 'The tornado caused complete destruction...'.
